calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-14-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Steven D. Cribb, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE, INC.
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant SCYENCE, INC.,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $50,991.29
Pre-Judgment Interest: $15,045.69
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $489.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $66,525.98

Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2017 Continued To Apr-25-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2016 Continued To Jan-24-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Robert Cohen, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to JAN-24-2017 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)
